---
title: "Data Exploration & Visualisation"
subtitle: "Methodology · Part 3"
author: "Team HeeHaa"
date: last-modified
---

> *(placeholder)* This page presents exploratory data analysis and the visualisation
> designs that informed the Shiny application.

## Exploratory data analysis

_Initial distributions: messages per agent, per channel, per round; activity over time._

```{r}
#| label: eda
#| eval: false

# TODO: replace with your actual EDA / plotting code
library(tidyverse)
```

## Visualisation design

_Discuss the chart choices (abnormality grid, bypass time series, communication
network, topic/evidence views) and the design principles behind them — clarity,
data-ink ratio, pre-attentive attributes, Gestalt, accessibility._

## From exploration to app

_How these prototypes map onto the four tabs of the [Shiny App](../user-guide.qmd)._
